# Temporal PCA

## Load trial-level behavioral data
```{r}
df.mem_ret <- df.trials |>
  filter(!resp_item_mem_acc %in% c("blink", "NO_RESPONSE")) |>
  select(
    participant_id,
    stim,
    goal,
    stim_old_new,
    trigger_status,
    resp_item_mem_acc,
    resp_src_mem_acc
  ) |>
  mutate(
    item_mem = case_when(
      resp_item_mem_acc == "Item Hit" ~ "Hit",
      resp_item_mem_acc == "Item Miss" ~ "Miss",
      resp_item_mem_acc == "Item FA" ~ "FA",
      resp_item_mem_acc == "Item CR" ~ "CR"
    ),
    source_mem = case_when(
      resp_src_mem_acc %in% c("Size Hit", "Pleasant Hit") ~ "Hit",
      resp_src_mem_acc %in% c("Size Miss", "Pleasant Miss") ~ "Miss",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    trigger_fct = factor(
      trigger_status,
      levels = cond_levels,
      labels = cond_labels
    ),
    is_triggered = trigger_status == "lapse_trigger"
  )

message(
  glue(
    "{nrow(df.mem_ret)} trials with valid labels ",
    "(OLD: {sum(df.mem_ret$stim_old_new == 'OLD')}, ",
    "NEW: {sum(df.mem_ret$stim_old_new == 'NEW')})"
  )
)
```

## Load pupil data
```{r}
pupil_files <- sort(list.files(path.pupil_dir, "*.parquet", full.names = TRUE))
message(glue("Found {length(pupil_files)} pupil files"))

df_fixposttrig <- map_dfr(
  seq_along(pupil_files), function(i) {
    raw <- pupil_files[i] |>
      read_parquet() |>
      as_tibble() |>
      filter(session == "ret", epoch %in% c("fixposttrig"))

    if (i %% 10 == 0 || i == 1 || i == length(pupil_files)) {
      message(glue("  [{i}/{length(pupil_files)}] {unique(raw$subject_id)[1]}"))
    }
    
    # fixposttrig pupil
    df <- raw |>
      filter(epoch == "fixposttrig")

    # flag trials where the trial-mean pupil exceeds +/- 3.5 SDs
    bad_trials <- df |>
      group_by(subject_id, session, run, item) |>
      summarise(trial_mean = mean(pupil, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
      group_by(subject_id, session, run) |>
      mutate(
        run_mean = mean(trial_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
        run_sd   = sd(trial_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
        z_trial  = (trial_mean - run_mean) / run_sd
      ) |>
      ungroup() |>
      filter(abs(z_trial) > 3.5)

    df |>
      anti_join(bad_trials, by = c("subject_id", "session", "run", "item")) |>
      select(subject_id, item, run, timebin, z_pupil)
  }
)
```

## pivot to trial $\times$ timepoint matrix
```{r}
df_fixposttrig_wide <- df_fixposttrig |>
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(subject_id, item, run),
    names_from = timebin,
    values_from = z_pupil,
    values_fn = mean
  )

time_cols <- setdiff(names(df_fixposttrig_wide), c("subject_id", "item", "run"))
time_cols <- time_cols[order(as.numeric(time_cols))]
time_vec <- as.numeric(time_cols)

df_fixposttrig_wide <- df_fixposttrig_wide |>
  mutate(participant_id = sprintf("sub-%02d", subject_id))

## merge with beh (restricted to triggered trials)
df_fixposttrig_all <- df_fixposttrig_wide |>
  inner_join(
    df.mem_ret |>
      # filter(trigger_status %in% c("no_lapse_no_trigger", "lapse_no_trigger")) |>
      filter(trigger_status %in% c("lapse_trigger")) |>
      select(
        participant_id,
        stim,
        stim_old_new,
        item_mem,
        source_mem,
        trigger_status,
        trigger_fct,
        is_triggered
      ),
    by = c("participant_id", "item" = "stim")
  ) |>
  mutate(
    item_mem_bin = case_when(
      item_mem == "Hit" ~ 1L,
      item_mem == "Miss" ~ 0L,
      TRUE ~ NA_integer_
    ),
    source_mem_bin = case_when(
      source_mem == "Hit" ~ 1L,
      source_mem == "Miss" ~ 0L,
      TRUE ~ NA_integer_
    ),
    mean_fixposttrig = rowMeans(across(all_of(time_cols)), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

## exclude subs
df_fixposttrig_all <- df_fixposttrig_all |>
  filter(!participant_id %in% ids_to_exclude)

message(glue("Total fixposttrig trials: {nrow(df_fixposttrig_all)}"))
message(glue("Subjects: {n_distinct(df_fixposttrig_all$participant_id)}"))

# prep matrix for tPCA -----------------------------------------------

X_all <- df_fixposttrig_all |>
  select(all_of(time_cols)) |>
  as.matrix()

all_valid <- complete.cases(X_all)

X_clean <- X_all[all_valid, ]

df_meta <- df_fixposttrig_all[all_valid, ] |>
  select(
    participant_id,
    item,
    run,
    stim_old_new,
    item_mem,
    source_mem,
    item_mem_bin,
    source_mem_bin,
    trigger_status,
    trigger_fct,
    is_triggered,
    mean_fixposttrig
  )

message(
  glue(
    "Complete cases: {nrow(X_clean)} / {nrow(X_all)} ",
    "({round(100 * nrow(X_clean) / nrow(X_all), 1)}%)"
  )
)
```

## Temporal PCA
```{r}
## Trial Level
run_tPCA <- function(input.data, time_cols, ncomp, sample) {
  subj.data <- input.data

  if (sample) {
    subj.data <- subj.data %>%
      slice_sample(n = nrow(.), replace = TRUE)
  }

  pca_input <- subj.data |>
    select(all_of(time_cols))

  # data.pca <- prcomp(pca_input, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)
  data.pca <- prcomp(pca_input, center = FALSE, scale. = FALSE)

  if (!sample) {
    plot(data.pca)  # scree plot
  }

  # change the sign of PC1, PC2 columns to flip the sign of the loadings
  # rot <- data.pca$rotation
  # rot[, c(1,2,3,4)] <- rot[, c(1,2,3,4)] * -1
  # data.pca$rotation <- rot

  raw.loadings     <- data.pca$rotation[,1:ncomp] %*% diag(data.pca$sdev, ncomp, ncomp)
  rotated.loadings <- varimax(raw.loadings)$loadings
  inv.loadings     <- t(pracma::pinv(rotated.loadings))
  loadings         <- rotated.loadings
  scores           <- scale(pca_input) %*% inv.loadings
  subj.pred        <- as_tibble(scores) %>%
    rename_with(~ gsub("V", "PC", .))

  if (!sample) {
    fviz_eig(data.pca, addlabels = TRUE)
  }

  pca.loadings <- as_tibble(matrix(as.numeric(loadings),
                                   attributes(loadings)$dim,
                                   dimnames=attributes(loadings)$dimnames),
                            rownames="time") %>%
    mutate(time = as.numeric(time))

  pca.loadings <- pca.loadings %>%
    rename_with(~ gsub("V", "PC", .))

  ss_loadings <- colSums(loadings^2)

  var_explained <- as_tibble(ss_loadings/nrow(loadings)) %>%
    mutate(percent_var_explained = value * 100) %>%
    add_column(component = pc_names)

  var_explained <- var_explained %>%
    arrange(desc(percent_var_explained)) %>%
    mutate(component_renamed = paste("PC", row_number(), sep=""))

  pca.loadings <- pca.loadings %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = pc_names,
                 names_to = "component",
                 values_to = "loading") %>%
    left_join(var_explained, by=c("component")) %>%
    rename(component_orig = component,
           component = component_renamed)

  subj.data.scores <- subj.data %>%
    add_column(subj.pred) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = pc_names,
                 names_to = "component",
                 values_to = "component_score") %>%
    left_join(var_explained, by=c("component")) %>%
    rename(component_orig = component,
           component = component_renamed)

  scores <- subj.data.scores

  return(list(pca.loadings, subj.data.scores, scores))
}

# run PCA ------------------------------------------------------------
ncomp <- 4
pc_names <- paste("PC", 1:ncomp, sep = "")
df_all_clean <- df_fixposttrig_all[all_valid, ]
output <- run_tPCA(df_all_clean, time_cols, ncomp, sample = FALSE)
original.loadings <- output[[1]]
original.scores <- output[[2]]
scores <- output[[3]]

peak_times <- original.loadings |>
  group_by(component) |>
  slice_max(abs(loading), n = 1) |>
  arrange(time) |>
  select(component, time, loading, percent_var_explained)

peak_times

# ordered by "peak time"
component_order_with_var_explained <- peak_times |>
  mutate(label = paste0(component, ": ", round(percent_var_explained, 2), "%")) |>
  pull(label)

component_order_with_var_explained

n_samples <- 1000

bootstrap_loadings <- function(data, time_cols, ncomp, n_samples) {
  pb <- cli::cli_progress_bar("Bootstrapping", total = n_samples)
  results <- lapply(seq_len(n_samples), function(i) {
    cli::cli_progress_update(id = pb)
    run_tPCA(data, time_cols, ncomp, sample = TRUE)[[1]]
  })
  cli::cli_progress_done(id = pb)
  bind_rows(results, .id = "bootstrapped_sample")
}

bootstrap.loadings <- bootstrap_loadings(df_all_clean, time_cols, ncomp, n_samples)

rainbow <- c(
  "#E82C42",
  "#F46D43",
  # "#FFCC00",
  "#29A343",
  "#1E8DD2"
  # "#59169C"
)

pca.loadings <- original.loadings
subj.pred <- original.scores

# Align bootstrap components to original solution (fix rotational indeterminacy)
orig_load_wide <- pca.loadings %>%
  select(time, component, loading) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = component, values_from = loading) %>%
  arrange(time)
orig_load_mat <- orig_load_wide %>% select(-time) %>% as.matrix()
comp_names <- colnames(orig_load_mat)

bootstrap.loadings <- bootstrap.loadings %>%
  group_by(bootstrapped_sample) %>%
  group_modify(function(.x, .y) {
    boot_wide <- .x %>%
      select(time, component, loading) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = component, values_from = loading) %>%
      arrange(time)
    boot_mat <- boot_wide %>% select(-time) %>% as.matrix()

    # Match bootstrap components to original by maximum absolute correlation
    cor_mat <- cor(orig_load_mat, boot_mat)
    used <- rep(FALSE, length(comp_names))
    mapping <- integer(length(comp_names))
    flip <- numeric(length(comp_names))

    for (i in seq_along(comp_names)) {
      avail <- which(!used)
      best <- avail[which.max(abs(cor_mat[i, avail]))]
      mapping[i] <- best
      flip[i] <- sign(cor_mat[i, best])
      used[best] <- TRUE
    }

    map_dfr(seq_along(comp_names), function(j) {
      tibble(
        time = boot_wide$time,
        component = comp_names[j],
        loading = boot_mat[, mapping[j]] * flip[j]
      )
    })
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

boot_ci <- bootstrap.loadings %>%
  group_by(component, time) %>%
  summarise(
    lo = quantile(loading, 0.025),
    hi = quantile(loading, 0.975),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pca.loadings %>%
  mutate(component = paste(component, ": ", round(percent_var_explained, 2),
                           "%",
                           sep = "")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = time,
             y = loading,
             color = component,
             fill = component)) +
  geom_line(linewidth=1) +
  labs(x = "Time (s)",
       y = "PC loading",
       title = "Components extracted by temporal PCA") +
  scale_color_manual(values=rainbow, name="")

pca.loadings %>%
  mutate(
    component_label = paste0(component, ": ", round(percent_var_explained, 2), "%"),
    component_label = factor(component_label, levels = component_order_with_var_explained)
  ) %>%
  left_join(boot_ci, by = c("component", "time")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = time,
             y = loading,
             color = component_label,
             fill = component_label)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth=1.2) +
  labs(x = "Time (s)",
       y = "PC loading",
       title = "Temporal PCA") +
  scale_color_manual(values=rainbow, name="") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=rainbow, name="") -> plot.new_pca
  # theme(text = element_text(size=15))

scores_wide <- scores %>%
  filter(item_mem %in% c("Hit", "Miss")) %>%
  mutate(item_mem_bin = as.integer(item_mem == "Hit")) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols     = c(subject_id, item, item_mem_bin),  # adjust to your actual ID columns
    names_from  = component,
    values_from = component_score
  )
# 
# fit.brm_comp_x_mem <- scores_wide %>%
#   brm(
#     item_mem_bin ~ 1 + PC1 + PC2 + PC3 + PC4 + (1 | subject_id),
#     data   = .,
#     cores  = 4,
#     seed   = 512,
#     file   = "models/brm_comp_x_mem5"
#   )

fit.brm_comp_x_mem <- scores %>%
  filter(item_mem %in% c("Hit", "Miss")) %>%
  brm(
    component_score ~ 1 + item_mem * component + (1 | subject_id),
    data   = .,
    cores  = 4,
    chains = 4,
    warmup = 1000,
    iter = 4000,
    seed   = 512,
    file   = "models/brm_comp_x_mem"
  )

fit.brm_comp_x_mem |> 
  plot()

fit.brm_comp_x_mem |> 
  pp_check(ndraws = 100)

# Effect of item_mem (Hit vs Miss) for each component
# PC1 — directly the main effect
hypothesis(fit.brm_comp_x_mem, "item_memMiss < 0")

# PC2 — main effect + interaction
hypothesis(fit.brm_comp_x_mem, "item_memMiss + item_memMiss:componentPC2 < 0")

# PC3
hypothesis(fit.brm_comp_x_mem, "item_memMiss + item_memMiss:componentPC3 < 0")

# PC4
hypothesis(fit.brm_comp_x_mem, "item_memMiss + item_memMiss:componentPC4 < 0")

scores %>%
  filter(item_mem %in% c("Hit", "Miss")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = component, y = component_score, col = item_mem, fill = item_mem)) +
    stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "bar",
    position = position_dodge(0.8),
    width = 0.7,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun.data = mean_se,
    geom = "errorbar",
    position = position_dodge(0.8),
    width = 0.2,
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Hit" = "#4C72B0", "Miss" = "#DD8452")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Hit" = "#4C72B0", "Miss" = "#DD8452")) +
  labs(x = "tPCA Component", y = "Mean Component Score", fill = "Memory", color = "Memory")
```

```{r}
df_fixposttrig_all %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -any_of(c("subject_id", "participant_id", "item", "run", "stim_old_new", "item_mem", "source_mem", "trigger_status", "trigger_fct")),
    names_to = "time",
    values_to = "pupil"
  ) %>%
  filter(item_mem %in% c("Hit", "Miss")) %>%
  mutate(time = as.numeric(time)) %>%
  # average within subject x time x memory first (avoids pseudoreplication)
  group_by(subject_id, time, item_mem) %>%
  summarise(pupil = mean(pupil, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = time, y = pupil, col = item_mem, fill = item_mem)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 0.8) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_se", geom = "ribbon", alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Hit" = "#4C72B0", "Miss" = "#DD8452")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Hit" = "#4C72B0", "Miss" = "#DD8452")) +
  labs(x = "Time (s)", y = "Pupil size (z)", color = "Memory", fill = "Memory") +
  theme_minimal()


df_fixposttrig_all %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -any_of(c("subject_id", "participant_id", "item", "run", "stim_old_new", "item_mem", "source_mem", "trigger_status", "trigger_fct")),
    names_to = "time",
    values_to = "pupil"
  ) %>%
  filter(item_mem %in% c("Hit", "Miss")) %>%
  mutate(time = as.numeric(time)) %>%
  group_by(subject_id, item, item_mem) %>%
  summarise(pupil = mean(pupil, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = item_mem, y = pupil, col = item_mem, fill = item_mem)) +
    stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "bar",
    position = position_dodge(0.8),
    width = 0.2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun.data = mean_se,
    geom = "errorbar",
    position = position_dodge(0.8),
    width = 0.2,
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Hit" = "#4C72B0", "Miss" = "#DD8452")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Hit" = "#4C72B0", "Miss" = "#DD8452")) +
  coord_flip
```

```{r}
df_pupil_mem <- df_fixposttrig_all %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -any_of(c("subject_id", "participant_id", "item", "run", "stim_old_new", 
                     "item_mem", "source_mem", "trigger_status", "trigger_fct")),
    names_to = "time",
    values_to = "pupil"
  ) %>%
  filter(item_mem %in% c("Hit", "Miss")) %>%
  mutate(
    time = as.numeric(time),
    item_mem = factor(item_mem, levels = c("Hit", "Miss"))
  ) %>%
  group_by(subject_id, item, item_mem) %>%
  summarise(pupil = mean(pupil, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

fit.brm_pupil_mem <- brm(
  pupil ~ item_mem + (1 + item_mem | subject_id),
  data = df_pupil_mem,
  family = gaussian(),
  chains = 4,
  cores = 4,
  iter = 4000,
  warmup = 1000,
  seed = 512,
  file = "models/brm_pupil_mem"
)

fit.brm_pupil_mem |> 
  plot()

fit.brm_pupil_mem |> 
  pp_check(ndraws = 100)

hypothesis(fit.brm_pupil_mem, "item_memMiss > 0")  # Miss > Hit

```

## Combined figure

```{r fig.width=14, fig.height=10, fig.dpi=300}
# A: Pupil timeseries (Hit vs Miss) for trigger trials, with non-triggered reference

# Triggered trials (already in df_fixposttrig_all)
df_trig_ts <- df_fixposttrig_all %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(time_cols), names_to = "time", values_to = "pupil") %>%
  filter(item_mem %in% c("Hit", "Miss")) %>%
  mutate(time = as.numeric(time)) %>%
  group_by(subject_id, time, item_mem) %>%
  summarise(pupil = mean(pupil, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Non-triggered trials (merge wide pupil with non-trigger beh)
df_notrig_ts <- df_fixposttrig_wide |>
  inner_join(
    df.mem_ret |>
      filter(trigger_status %in% c("no_lapse_no_trigger", "lapse_no_trigger")) |>
      select(participant_id, stim, item_mem),
    by = c("participant_id", "item" = "stim")
  ) |>
  filter(!participant_id %in% ids_to_exclude) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(time_cols), names_to = "time", values_to = "pupil") |>
  filter(item_mem %in% c("Hit", "Miss")) |>
  mutate(time = as.numeric(time)) |>
  group_by(subject_id, time) |>
  summarise(pupil = mean(pupil, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

plot.tpca_timeseries <- ggplot() +
  # Non-triggered reference (gray dashed)
  stat_summary(data = df_notrig_ts, aes(x = time, y = pupil),
               fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 0.8,
               color = "gray60", linetype = "dashed") +
  stat_summary(data = df_notrig_ts, aes(x = time, y = pupil),
               fun.data = "mean_se", geom = "ribbon", alpha = 0.1,
               fill = "gray60", color = NA) +
  # Triggered Hit/Miss
  stat_summary(data = df_trig_ts, aes(x = time, y = pupil, col = item_mem, fill = item_mem),
               fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 0.8) +
  stat_summary(data = df_trig_ts, aes(x = time, y = pupil, col = item_mem, fill = item_mem),
               fun.data = "mean_se", geom = "ribbon", alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Hit" = "#4C72B0", "Miss" = "#DD8452")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Hit" = "#4C72B0", "Miss" = "#DD8452")) +
  annotate("text", x = max(as.numeric(time_cols)), y = Inf,
           label = "- - Not triggered", color = "gray50",
           hjust = 1, vjust = 1.5, size = 8, family = "Inter") +
  labs(x = "Time (s)", y = "Pupil size (z)", color = "Memory", fill = "Memory")
  # theme_classic(base_size = 14, base_family = "Inter")

# B: Mean pupil Hit vs Miss
plot.tpca_pupil_bar <- df_fixposttrig_all %>%
  filter(item_mem %in% c("Hit", "Miss")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = item_mem, y = mean_fixposttrig, col = item_mem, fill = item_mem)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", width = 0.6, alpha = 0.7) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.15, linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Hit" = "#4C72B0", "Miss" = "#DD8452")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Hit" = "#4C72B0", "Miss" = "#DD8452")) +
  labs(x = "Item memory", y = "Mean pupil (z)") +
  # theme_classic(base_size = 14, base_family = "Inter") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# C: PCA loadings with bootstrap CIs
plot.tpca_loadings <- pca.loadings %>%
  mutate(
    component_label = paste0(component, ": ", round(percent_var_explained, 1), "%"),
    component_label = factor(component_label, levels = component_order_with_var_explained)
  ) %>%
  left_join(boot_ci, by = c("component", "time")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = time, y = loading, color = component_label, fill = component_label)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = rainbow, name = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rainbow, name = "") +
  labs(x = "Time (ms)", y = "PC loading", title = "Temporal PCA components") 
  # theme_classic(base_size = 14, base_family = "Inter")

# D: Component scores by Hit/Miss
plot.tpca_scores <- scores %>%
  filter(item_mem %in% c("Hit", "Miss")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = component, y = component_score, col = item_mem, fill = item_mem)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", position = position_dodge(0.8),
               width = 0.7, alpha = 0.7) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", position = position_dodge(0.8),
               width = 0.2, linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Hit" = "#4C72B0", "Miss" = "#DD8452")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Hit" = "#4C72B0", "Miss" = "#DD8452")) +
  labs(x = "tPCA Component", y = "Mean component score", fill = "Memory", color = "Memory"
       #title = "Component scores by memory"
       ) +
  # theme_classic(base_size = 14, base_family = "Inter") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# Compose
design <- "
AABB
CCDD
"

plot.tpca_timeseries + plot.tpca_pupil_bar +
  plot.new_pca + plot.tpca_scores +
  plot_layout(design = design) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "a") &
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 32, face = "bold", family = "Arial"))

ggsave(here("plots", "fig3.svg"),
       width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
```
